title: Reliq
description: Title slide — Reliq, a discovery-first vintage marketplace.

title: Context
description: Vintage shopping is about discovery, not search.

title: Problem
description: Online vintage feels repetitive, narrow, and over-personalised.

title: Existing Platforms
description: Vinted, Depop, and Etsy are built for search and resale, not browsing.

title: Solution
description: Reliq's four core features: Shopping Persona, Style Influence, Hidden Gems, Shop Rack Browsing.

title: Evaluation & Outcome
description: Testing focus and the outcome: wider discovery, more visibility for independent shops.
